disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Two Singaporeans complete quarantine after returning from cruise with deadly hantavirus outbreak - Malay Mail
updates.body_en: Two Singaporeans complete quarantine after returning from cruise with deadly hantavirus outbreak Malay Mail
updates.summary_zh: 两名新加坡人完成邮轮汉坦病毒疫情隔离。

updates.title_en: Tools to fight hantavirus show promise despite limited funding. Now researchers hope to continue - Santa Fe New Mexican
updates.body_en: Tools to fight hantavirus show promise despite limited funding. Now researchers hope to continue Santa Fe New Mexican
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒防治工具研究取得进展，但资金有限。

updates.title_en: NZ cruise passenger tests negative for hantavirus - Taipei Times
updates.body_en: NZ cruise passenger tests negative for hantavirus Taipei Times
updates.summary_zh: 新西兰邮轮乘客汉坦病毒检测阴性。

updates.title_en: Cruise ship Hondius departs Rotterdam for Norway after deadly hantavirus outbreak - NL Times
updates.body_en: Cruise ship Hondius departs Rotterdam for Norway after deadly hantavirus outbreak NL Times
updates.summary_zh: 邮轮Hondius号在致命汉坦病毒暴发后离开鹿特丹前往挪威。

updates.title_en: Texans clear hantavirus quarantine following cruise outbreak - Click2Houston
updates.body_en: Texans clear hantavirus quarantine following cruise outbreak Click2Houston
updates.summary_zh: 得克萨斯州居民结束邮轮疫情隔离。

updates.title_en: Texas cruise passengers complete hantavirus monitoring with no infections, state says - FOX 7 Austin
updates.body_en: Texas cruise passengers complete hantavirus monitoring with no infections, state says FOX 7 Austin
updates.summary_zh: 得州邮轮乘客完成监测，无感染。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus monitoring complete for 2 Texas passengers from cruise ship outbreak, health officials say - ABC13 Houston
updates.body_en: Hantavirus monitoring complete for 2 Texas passengers from cruise ship outbreak, health officials say ABC13 Houston
updates.summary_zh: 美国德州两名邮轮乘客汉坦病毒监测结束。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus monitoring completed for Texas passengers from the MV Hondius - KCBD.com
updates.body_en: Hantavirus monitoring completed for Texas passengers from the MV Hondius KCBD.com
updates.summary_zh: 美国德州MV Hondius邮轮乘客汉坦病毒监测完成。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus cases remain at 13, no new deaths reported in over month: WHO chief - Anadolu Ajansı
updates.body_en: Hantavirus cases remain at 13, no new deaths reported in over month: WHO chief Anadolu Ajansı
updates.summary_zh: WHO称汉坦病毒病例仍为13例，月余无新增死亡。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus: Argentina expands probe to trace outbreak source - DW.com
updates.body_en: Hantavirus: Argentina expands probe to trace outbreak source DW.com
updates.summary_zh: 阿根廷扩大汉坦病毒溯源调查。

updates.title_en: Scientists retrace steps of Dutch tourists as Argentina expands hantavirus probe - The Independent
updates.body_en: Scientists retrace steps of Dutch tourists as Argentina expands hantavirus probe The Independent
updates.summary_zh: 科学家追踪荷兰游客轨迹，阿根廷扩大汉坦病毒调查。

updates.title_en: Novel technique enables rapid sequencing of rare hantaviruses - News-Medical
updates.body_en: Novel technique enables rapid sequencing of rare hantaviruses News-Medical
updates.summary_zh: 新技术实现罕见汉坦病毒快速测序。

updates.title_en: Argentina expands hantavirus probe, sending teams to trap and test rats in Mendoza - ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
updates.body_en: Argentina expands hantavirus probe, sending teams to trap and test rats in Mendoza ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
updates.summary_zh: 阿根廷派团队在门多萨捕鼠检测，扩大汉坦病毒调查。

updates.title_en: Argentina expands hantavirus probe, sending teams to trap and test rats in Mendoza - Toronto Star
updates.body_en: Argentina expands hantavirus probe, sending teams to trap and test rats in Mendoza Toronto Star
updates.summary_zh: 阿根廷扩大汉坦病毒调查，派团队在门多萨捕鼠检测。

updates.title_en: I Was on the Deadly Hantavirus Cruise. Now I'm One of 18 People in Quarantine. - Outside Magazine
updates.body_en: I Was on the Deadly Hantavirus Cruise. Now I'm One of 18 People in Quarantine. Outside Magazine
updates.summary_zh: 亲历者讲述致命汉坦病毒邮轮经历，目前18人隔离。

updates.title_en: Bend Doctor Who Took Charge During Deadly Hantavirus Outbreak Finally Returns Home - KTVZ
updates.body_en: Bend Doctor Who Took Charge During Deadly Hantavirus Outbreak Finally Returns Home KTVZ
updates.summary_zh: 美国本德医生在致命汉坦疫情中负责指挥后终于回家。

updates.title_en: WHO Health Emergencies EPI-WIN webinar: Hantavirus in focus III: reflections from the IHR Border Health and Points of Entry perspective - World Health Organization (WHO)
updates.body_en: WHO Health Emergencies EPI-WIN webinar: Hantavirus in focus III: reflections from the IHR Border Health and Points of Entry perspective World Health Organization (WHO)
updates.summary_zh: WHO 举办汉坦病毒网络研讨会，聚焦边境卫生与入境点。
